name: Hot & Spicy Pepper & Apricot Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb Sweet red peppers, cored and cut into 1/4 inch dice (3 cups)
12 oz Dried apricots, cut into 1/4 inch dice
1 3-inch piece Fresh gingerroot, peeled and thinly sliced (3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sweet red peppers, apricots, raisins, onion, garlic, gingerroot, salt, red pepper flakes, cumin seeds, mustard seeds, and sugar in a large saucepan.
2. Cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally, over medium heat until the sugar dissolves (about 5 minutes).
3. Add the vinegar. Continue cooking, stirring often, until the mixture is shiny and thick (30-35 minutes).
4. Cool. Cover and refrigerate.
